name: Crystal Violet Staining Solution

notes.en: Fix and stain adherent cells: wash with PBS, apply staining solution for 20 min at RT, rinse thoroughly with ddH₂O, air-dry. To quantify: dissolve stain in 10% acetic acid, read absorbance at OD₅₉₅. Used for colony formation assays and biofilm detection.
notes.zh: 固定并染色贴壁细胞: PBS 洗 → 加染色液覆盖 → 室温 20 min → ddH₂O 反复冲洗 → 晾干。定量: 加 10% 冰醋酸溶解结晶紫，OD₅₉₅ 测吸光度。适用于克隆形成实验 (colony formation assay) 和生物膜检测。

ref: Feoktistova et al. (2016) Cold Spring Harb Protoc 2016(4):pdb.prot087379

usage.en: Crystal violet cell stain for colony counting, cell viability, and migration assays.
usage.zh: 结晶紫细胞染色液，用于克隆计数、细胞活力和迁移实验。

prepSteps.step: Dissolve crystal violet (0.5 g per 100 mL, 0.5% w/v) in 20% methanol.
prepSteps.warning: Crystal violet is a potential carcinogen — wear gloves. Methanol is toxic.

prepSteps.step: Store at room temperature for up to 12 months.
